name: Syntax Correction Test Suite
description: Comprehensive tests for LLM error detection and correction in Mirror DSL
notes: Covers: typos, CSS syntax, structural errors, property errors, value errors

cases.description: Keeps same component type when correcting typos
cases.notes: Should not generate navigation, forms, or other unrelated components
LLM should recognize intent and add proper quotes
Should convert CSS-like syntax to Mirror DSL syntax

input.prompt: Row display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 16px

cases.description: Converts CSS alignment to Mirror center
Removes curly braces from CSS-like syntax
Converts HTML tags to Mirror components
Converts percentage to full or number
Fixes multiple errors in one line

input.prompt:
Crad pad 16px
  Buttn bg: #333
  Textt col: #fff "Hello"

cases.description: Preserves state structure while fixing errors
Handles component with missing children reference

cases.notes: LLM should infer component type (likely Box)

cases.description: Handles German keywords mixed with DSL
cases.notes: LLM should translate German keywords to DSL

cases.description: Converts Tailwind color blue-500 to hex
Converts Tailwind color slate-800 to hex

cases.notes: Post-processor converts 2em to 32, LLM may just remove em suffix

cases.description: Converts single quotes to double quotes
Converts HTML button tag to Mirror Button
Converts HTML input tag to Mirror Input
Converts HTML h1 tag to Mirror Title

cases.notes: Common mistake from programming backgrounds
Common error - forgetting commas between properties
HTML/React habit - using name attribute
LLM may output .5 instead of 0.5 which is valid
String should typically come after properties
CSS class selector habit
React inline style habit
Accidental caps lock
Custom component name - should work or convert to Button
LLM may convert height 100 to height full which is valid
CSS flex shorthand
JavaScript/React style property names

cases.description: Handles CSS gradient by using solid color
cases.notes: Gradients not supported - should use first color or simplify
Each property on its own line
HSL should be converted to hex
CSS margin shorthands
CSS padding shorthands
Form is not a Mirror component
Comma after hover is unnecessary

cases.description: Converts German color grün to hex
cases.notes: German color name
Multiple CSS issues in one line
Tailwind color names should be converted
React inline style object syntax

cases.description: Converts CSS var() to value or removes
Handles number as first token after component
Converts color name orange to hex
Converts color name purple to hex
Converts color name cyan to hex
Converts German schwarz to black hex
Converts German weiß to white hex
Converts German gelb to yellow hex
Converts French rouge to red hex
Converts Spanish azul to blue hex
